items.title: Roord in topvorm met hattrick tegen AZ, titelfavorieten maken geen fout
items.summary: In dit blog volgen we alle ontwikkelingen in het vrouwenvoetbal. We besteden onder meer aandacht aan de Eurojackpot Vrouwen Eredivisie, de Europese toernooien en het Nederlands elftal.

items.title: Feyenoorder Deijl niet de snelste debutant in de Eredivisie
items.summary: Feyenoord en Heracles Almelo stonden zondagmiddag om 16.45 uur tegenover elkaar in de Eredivisie. De Rotterdammers verspeelden vier competitieduels op rij punten en aasden dus op eerherstel. Dat gebeurde tegen de hekkensluiter van Nederland. Lees alles terug over het duel in de VI Live.

items.title: ‘We got punished’: Arteta rues errors as Arsenal’s title tilt stalls with United loss
items.summary: Zubimendi mistake led to Mbeumo equaliser ‘We were dominant … after we gave them the goal’ Mikel Arteta blamed individual errors for Arsenal’s 3-2 defeat against Manchester United, on a weekend when their lead in the Premier League title race was cut to four points. Arsenal were 1-0 up when the game was transformed by Martín Zubimendi’s mis‑hit back-pass, which presented Bryan Mbeumo with an equaliser. United scored with outstanding strikes from distance by Patrick Dorgu and Matheus Cunha in the second half to stun the leaders. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Milan op voorsprong in Rome, Go Ahead-opponent op schot
items.summary: Zondag wordt er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. AZ gaat om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Telstar, FC Groningen speelt tegen Fortuna Sittard, FC Utrecht ontvangt Sparta Rotterdam en ook in het buitenland staat ons veel moois te wachten. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: Marathonman Deijl glimlacht: 'Ik klop het even af'
items.summary: Feyenoord kampt met heel veel pijntjes en blessures dit seizoen. Mede daarom stond de kersverse aanwinst Mats Deijl direct in de basis tegen Heracles Almelo zondagmiddag en deed negentig minuten mee. De rechtsback maakte dit seizoen al liefst 2595 officiële wedstrijdminuten en dat is meer dan elke andere veldspeler van Feyenoord. Toch is er volgens Deijl geen bijzonder geheim om zijn fitheid te verklaren.

items.title: Arteta challenges 'poor' Arsenal after Man Utd loss
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has challenged Arsenal to show the mental strength to win the Premier League after falling to a nervous 3-2 home defeat against Manchester United.

items.title: Oviedo coach: Yamal goal from 'another galaxy'
items.summary: Real Oviedo coach Guillermo Almada branded Lamine Yamal a player from "another galaxy" after the Barcelona forward's wonder goal in Sunday's LaLiga meeting between the two sides.

items.title: Carrick cool after Arsenal win: Big games coming
items.summary: Michael Carrick said Manchester United have "bigger games to come" after a 3-2 victory against Premier League leaders Arsenal.

items.title: Sources: Fulham bid $38m for USMNT's Pepi
items.summary: Fulham have made a bid of €32 million ($38m) for the services of PSV forward Ricardo Pepi, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Totally unrealistic to win every game - Arteta
items.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says his side were "not at their best today" but it is "totally unrealistic" to win every single game after his side lost 3-2 to Manchester United at the Emirates Stadium.

items.title: Perez hekelt krampaanvallen en fysieke data: 'Doe die bh's eens af'
items.summary: Kenneth Perez heeft met verbazing gekeken naar de krampaanvallen bij de spelers van Feyenoord. Volgens de 24-voudig Deens international moeten trainers in het algemeen wat minder kijken naar de fysieke data en meer naar wat ze zien gebeuren op het veld.

items.title: Arsenal their own worst enemy as Carrick's dream Man Utd start continues
Cunha scores stunning late winner as Man Utd beat Arsenal
items.summary: Two sensational second-half strikes give Manchester United a huge win that takes them above Chelsea and Liverpool into fourth.

items.title: Buendia scores screamer as Villa beat Newcastle
items.summary: Emiliano Buendia and Ollie Watkins both score as high-flying Aston Villa end their long wait for a St James' Park victory against Newcastle United.

items.title: Estevao-inspired Chelsea beat Crystal Palace
items.summary: Estevao Willian replaces the injured Cole Palmer to inspire Chelsea to a comfortable win over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.

items.title: Forest boost survival hopes after win at Brentford
items.summary: Nottingham Forest gave their hopes of Premier League survival a major boost with a hard-fought win against Brentford at Gtech Community Stadium.

items.title: Beating Arsenal puts Man United into Premier League title race
items.summary: Man United are 12 points behind league-leading Arsenal, but after beating the Gunners on Sunday, can the Red Devils pull off an unlikely title push?

items.title: Arsenal's mental strength questioned by Vieira
items.summary: Arsenal's former captain Patrick Vieira has questioned the Gunners' "mental strength" in the Premier League title race after they lost at home to Manchester United.

items.title: Two WONDER strikes fire Man Utd to huge win in five-goal thriller at Emirates!
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Arsenal’s match against Manchester United in the Premier League.

items.title: Will Hearts be caught by Celtic or Rangers in thrilling title race?
items.summary: "We've been top of the league for four months - that's not just a purple patch."
